organization: HDFC ERGO General Insurance Company Limited

benefits.name: Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Covers medical expenses incurred during the 30 days immediately before hospitalization.

benefits.name: Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Covers medical expenses incurred up to 60 days from the date the insured person is discharged from the hospital.

benefits.name: Domiciliary Hospitalization
benefits.description: Covers medical expenses incurred on domiciliary hospitalization of the insured.

benefits.name: Organ Donor Cover
benefits.description: Covers medical expenses for organ donor's hospitalization for harvesting of the donated organ.

benefits.name: Road Ambulance Cover
benefits.description: Covers expenses incurred on road ambulance services if the insured person is required to be transferred to the nearest hospital following an emergency.

benefits.name: Hospital Cash
benefits.description: Covers a daily cash benefit for hospitalization as specified in the schedule of coverage.

benefits.name: Maternity Cover
benefits.description: Covers maternity expenses incurred during the policy period, subject to waiting periods and limits.

benefits.name: Pre and Post Natal Expenses
benefits.description: Covers medical expenses incurred during the pre and post natal period.

benefits.name: Critical Illness Benefit
benefits.description: Covers an increase in sum insured by 100% if diagnosed with critical illness, subject to waiting period.

exclusions.name: Pre-existing Diseases
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing disease and its direct complications are excluded until the expiry of 48 months.

exclusions.name: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of specified conditions are excluded until the expiry of 12 months.

exclusions.name: 30-day Waiting Period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date are excluded.

exclusions.name: Diagnostic Admission Expenses
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any admission primarily for diagnostic and evaluation purposes only.

exclusions.name: Non-Related Diagnostic Expenses
exclusions.description: Any diagnostic expenses which are not related or not incidental to the current diagnosis and treatment.

exclusions.name: Rest Cure and Rehabilitation
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any admission primarily for enforced bed rest and not for receiving treatment.

exclusions.name: Obesity/Weight Control Treatment
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the surgical treatment of obesity/weight control.

exclusions.name: Change-of-Gender Treatments
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any treatment for change of gender.

exclusions.name: Cosmetic or Plastic Surgery
exclusions.description: Expenses for cosmetic or plastic surgery or any treatment to change appearance unless for reconstruction following an accident, burn(s) or cancer.

exclusions.name: Hazardous or Adventure Sports
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any treatment arising from hazardous or adventure sports.

exclusions.name: Breach of Law
exclusions.description: Expenses for treatment directly arising from or consequent to breach of law.

exclusions.name: Alcoholism and Substance Abuse
exclusions.description: Treatment for alcoholism, drug or substance abuse or any addictive condition and consequences.

exclusions.name: Non-Medical Expenses
exclusions.description: Non-medical expenses such as food charges, laundry charges, attendant charges, etc.

exclusions.name: Alopecia and Baldness Treatment
exclusions.description: Any treatment and associated expenses for alopecia, baldness including corticosteroids.

exclusions.name: Sterility and Infertility Treatment
exclusions.description: Expenses related to sterility and infertility.

exclusions.name: Maternity Expenses
exclusions.description: Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth except ectopic pregnancy; expenses towards miscarriage unless due to an accident.

exclusions.name: Investigative Treatments
exclusions.description: Investigative treatment for sleep-apnoea, general debility or exhaustion.

exclusions.name: Circumcision
exclusions.description: Circumcisions unless necessitated by illness or injury.

exclusions.name: Convalescence and Long-term Nursing Care
exclusions.description: Any convalescence, sanatorium treatment, private duty nursing or long-term nursing care.

exclusions.name: Vaccination
exclusions.description: Vaccination including inoculation and immunisations except post animal bite treatment.

exclusions.name: Unproven Treatments
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any unproven treatment, services and supplies.
